title: Historian pattern-scan activity_filter_exclude: 22-token blocklist added to filt
rationale: Pattern-scan quality was severely degraded by maintenance-routine phrases that appear in nearly every session. This fix makes the scan signal-to-noise ratio viable for long-term use.
description: Historian pattern-scan activity_filter_exclude: 22-token blocklist added to filter protocol-routine activity[] phrases before Jaccard similarity scan. First pass found 30/40 clusters were noise from 'committed', 'updated', 'copied' etc. Filter applied only to activity[] field — open[] and decisions[] unfiltered. Eliminates calibration noise from all future pattern-scan runs across all spokes.
decision_reason: Category: other. Impact: 8/10. Defer until higher-priority signals processed.
